allow: PowerShell(git add Propertify.Web/Controllers/AccountController.cs Propertify.Web/Controllers/AdminController.cs Propertify.Web/Controllers/ContractController.cs Propertify.Web/Controllers/DashboardController.cs Propertify.Web/Controllers/HomeController.cs Propertify.Web/Controllers/SettingsController.cs Propertify.Web/Controllers/TenantController.cs Propertify.Web/Controllers/UtilityController.cs Propertify.Web/Controllers/MobileApiController.cs Propertify.Web/Controllers/SupplierController.cs Propertify.Web/Data/ApplicationDbContext.cs Propertify.Web/Migrations Propertify.Web/Models/User.cs Propertify.Web/Models/UtilityBill.cs Propertify.Web/Models/ActivityLog.cs Propertify.Web/Models/Supplier.cs Propertify.Web/Models/SystemSetting.cs Propertify.Web/Program.cs Propertify.Web/Views Propertify.Web/appsettings.json Propertify.Web/wwwroot/css/site.css)
PowerShell(git add .claude/settings.json; git status --short | Where-Object { $_ -match "^\\?\\?" -or $_ -match "^ M" } | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "bin/" -and $_ -notmatch "obj/" })

PowerShell(\(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch "Loopback" -and $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch "vEthernet" -and $_.IPAddress -notmatch "^169" } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias\))
